name: Fonoa Tax Automation API
what_it_does: Fonoa REST API for global indirect tax automation and e-invoicing compliance. Enables AI agents to validate tax IDs, calculate VAT/GST/sales tax for digital transactions, generate compliant invoices, and report transactions to tax authorities in 100+ countries. Fonoa is purpose-built for digital economy companies (SaaS, marketplaces, gig economy) with complex cross-border tax requirements.
use_cases: Validating VAT registration numbers from customer onboarding agents
Calculating and applying correct tax rates from checkout and billing agents
Generating and filing e-invoices from AP/AR automation agents
Reporting transaction data to tax authorities from compliance automation agents
not_for: US-only sales tax without international requirements (use Avalara or TaxJar)
Income tax or corporate tax filing
Simple invoicing without multi-jurisdiction compliance needs
best_when: A digital economy company (SaaS, marketplace, gig platform) operating globally wants AI agents to automate VAT/GST calculation, ID validation, e-invoicing, and cross-border tax compliance.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax calculation errors result in regulatory penalties. Fonoa covers indirect tax only — not a complete tax solution for all tax types.

auth.notes: Fonoa uses API key authentication with the key in the Authorization header as Bearer token. Separate keys for sandbox and production environments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; sandbox environment available for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction pricing based on volume; enterprise contracts for high volume
pricing.notes: Netherlands-based company. Pay-per-transaction model. Sandbox available for integration testing. Acquired by Thomson Reuters in 2023.

performance.rate_limits: High throughput supported; rate limits per API key

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax calculation errors result in regulatory penalties and VAT liability
No public MCP server — REST API with Bearer token auth
Indirect tax only (VAT/GST) — not a complete tax solution for all tax types
Separate sandbox and production API keys — never use production keys in testing
Tax rules change frequently — Fonoa content updates automatically but verify edge cases
Thomson Reuters acquisition may affect product roadmap and pricing
EU e-invoicing mandates (Italy, France, Germany) have strict timeline requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Tax transaction data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Netherlands company — EU-first. Bearer token auth. Thomson Reuters owned since 2023.

security_score_components.security_notes: Tax transaction data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Netherlands company. Bearer token auth. Thomson Reuters owned.
